title: Evidence-Carrying Analysis Artifact (ECAA) — Specification v0.1
description: Normative specification for the Evidence-Carrying Analysis Artifact (ECAA), a portable machine-checkable conformance contract for AI-generated bioinformatic analyses over a WRROC v0.5 Tier-3 substrate. Defines 8 typed sub-graphs (Intent, Decision, Execution, Evidence, Claim, Equivalence, Failure, Audit-proof), 4 validity-preserving operations (compose, amend, re-execute, ablate), 6 machine-checkable audit-proof invariants, and a 5-bar conformance suite. Apache-2.0.
